title: ephedra fragilis var. dissoluta
intro: Ephedra fragilis var. dissoluta is a type of desert plant, specifically a variety of the ephedra plant, which is a type of shrub-like gymnosperm that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the nervous system and increase circulation. The health benefits of ephedra fragilis var. dissoluta include reducing symptoms of asthma and bronchitis, as well as improving mental clarity and reducing fatigue. In herbal preparations, ephedra fragilis var. dissoluta is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, capsules, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
